WhyItMatters: Identity risk can indicate that authentication succeeded from a context that should not automatically be trusted.
ReviewSteps: Review risky users and risky sign-ins in Microsoft Entra.
Compare sign-in timestamps, locations, device trust, and Conditional Access outcome.
Validate MFA method strength and sign-in risk/user risk policy response.
Review whether the activity aligns with expected user behavior.
If unauthorized activity is confirmed, follow approved response workflow.
RecommendedActions: Validate session controls for risky sessions.
